prompt: Our Slack workspace has 47 channels pinging me constantly. Mute the noisy ones and set up DND so I can focus for the next 3 hours.
The CI pipeline dumps 2000 lines of log output for every build. Filter it down to just errors and warnings.
I'm getting alert fatigue from Datadog. Help me set up filters so I only see critical and high-severity alerts, not the informational noise.
Suppress the deprecation warnings in our test output — they're drowning out the actual test failures.
Our Kubernetes pods are generating gigabytes of debug logs that nobody reads. Reduce the log verbosity to info level and filter out the health check spam.
I need a focused work environment. Silence all non-essential notifications across Slack, email, and calendar for the next 2 hours, and give me a way to undo it.
This Prometheus alert rule fires 50 times a day for the same non-issue. Create a silence rule for it while preserving alerts for the related but actually-important metric.
The webpack build output is so verbose I can't find the actual errors. Suppress the chunk details and module resolution noise.
Our syslog is full of cron job chatter that makes it impossible to spot real issues. Set up a filter to suppress the routine cron output.
Help me create a noise-reduction config for our monitoring stack. I want to see real incidents, not the same 20 known-harmless alerts every morning.
